code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn append_parsed(_ xs: List<Int>, _ s: String) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(s)
  when Some(n)
    list.push(xs, n)
  when None
    xs
  end
end

fn run(_ line: String) -> Unit
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(line, i)
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        nums = append_parsed(nums, cur)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    nums = append_parsed(nums, cur)
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  let m = nums.len()
  mut j = 0
  while j < m
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if not has_prev or v != prev
        result = list.push(result, v)
        prev = v
        has_prev = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  let r = result.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < r
    match result.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      if k == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    run(line)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
